mapper.select: SELECT c.*, cd_ct.code_label AS coupon_type_cd_nm, cd_cs.code_label AS coupon_status_cd_nm, cd_tt.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm, cd_mg.code_label AS mem_grade_cd_nm FROM pm_coupon c LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ct ON cd_ct.code_grp = 'COUPON_TYPE' AND cd_ct.code_value = c.coupon_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_cs ON cd_cs.code_grp = 'COUPON_STATUS' AND cd_cs.code_value = c.coupon_status_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_tt ON cd_tt.code_grp = 'COUPON_TARGET' AND cd_tt.code_value = c.target_type_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_mg ON cd_mg.code_grp = 'MEMBER_GRADE' AND cd_mg.code_value = c.mem_grade_cd WHERE c.coupon_id = #{id}
SELECT ci.*, m.member_nm, m.member_email FROM pm_coupon_issue ci LEFT JOIN mb_member m ON m.member_id = ci.member_id WHERE ci.coupon_id = #{couponId} ORDER BY ci.issue_date DESC
